title: foundation — canonical ULID prefix registry
description: Authoritative mapping of every ULID prefix used in Academorix. A prefix is a short (3–4 char) semantic tag preceding the 26-char base32 ULID body, forming a primary key like `plt_01HXYZ...` (TenantLocale). The pattern is enforced by every model's `keyPrefix` in x-eloquent + the corresponding JSON Schema `pattern` in properties. Every prefix must be UNIQUE across the platform; this file is the source of truth. Prefix rules: 3–4 lowercase letters + trailing underscore, ASCII only, no vowel-only sequences that read as English words (avoid `and_`, `for_`, `not_` is intentional).

constraints.reservation_convention: First-registered wins. Renames require this registry to be updated in the SAME commit as the schema changes.

aac_.description: Registry entry for an action decorated with #[AsApprovableAction]. Populated by boot-time discovery.

acg_.description: Short-lived (300s) cross-Application SSO grant token. Consumed atomically at exchange.

aev_.description: 24-hour TTL email verification token. Hashed at rest.

agr_.description: Per-resource dynamic access grant. Polymorphic subject + resource, JSONB permissions, decision enum (allow/deny - deny wins).

ajd_.description: Revoked jti with natural expiry. Populated by password-change / user-suspend / breach-response flows.

ajk_.description: HS256 signing key with per-Application binding + kid rotation. Secret KMS-envelope-encrypted at rest.

amc_.description: Auth-side pending MFA challenge ledger row. Shared with mfa module (mfc_ is mfa's alias for the same shape).

apd_.description: Individual approve/reject decision by an approver. Write-once - no update, no delete.

apg_.description: Approver group within a template. Ordered via sort_order for sequential + parallel semantics. Quorum type all/any/n_of_m.

api_.description: One row per triggered approval flow. Polymorphic subject; immutable-once-created except for lifecycle status transitions.

apn_.description: Per-approver reminder audit row. De-duplicated via composite unique on (requirement, approver, reminder_number).

app_.description: Product container. One or more tenants belong to an Application.

apr_.description: Per-approver-group requirement materialised at instance-create time. Snapshotted selector + resolved_approvers (delegation-aware).

apt_.description: Tenant-authored approval rule set (runtime data per D-A4). Versioned; multiple templates per action_key with priority-ordered match.

atr_.description: Refresh token in the rotation-with-reuse-detection chain. Polymorphic tokenable, family_id for lockdown cascade.

aud_.description: Compliance-grade audit entry with cryptographic hash chain.

brd_.description: Theme + logo profile per Tenant. Extracted from tenants at v0.3.

bst_.description: Catalogue entry driving per-tenant defaults (features, terminology, seeded roles). Dual-source — code-primary via BusinessTypeEnum + DB mirror in business_types for admin UI + tenant customs (per .kiro/steering/enum-db-seed-dual-source.md).

cat_.description: Module-fed category registry row (platform default when tenant_id=null, tenant override otherwise).

ccg_.description: Catalogue row for a consent category (essential / functional / marketing / analytics / ai-training / minor-parental). Platform defaults have tenant_id=null; tenant overrides shadow them.

cns_.description: Immutable subject x category x decision snapshot. Withdrawal writes a new row rather than mutating an existing one.

cup_.description: In-flight multipart / tus.io state row. State machine: initiating → uploading → finalizing → completed | aborted | expired.

delv_.description: Per-channel delivery attempt row for a Notification.

dep_.description: RFC 8594 Sunset workflow entry — announces upcoming API version removal.

dlg_.description: Time-bounded delegation of a delegator's role(s) to a delegate in the same tenant. Max 90-day window.

dom_.description: Canonical hostname owned by a Tenant. State machine: pending -> verifying -> verified -> expired.

drc_.description: DNS record inside a Domain. Diff-state, not lifecycle-tracked.

dsa_.description: Per-module contribution to a DSAR bundle. Points at a storage::File.

dsr_.description: Data-subject-access-request state machine (received -> triaging -> collecting -> assembling -> delivered | rejected).

fil_.description: Uploaded file record. Polymorphic via fileable_type/fileable_id. Content-addressable dedup via sha256 with per-blob refcount.

fvr_.description: Derived rendition of a File (thumbnail / medium / hero / pdf-thumbnail). One row per (file, variant_key).

gfc_.description: Immutable audit log of geofence evaluations.

idn_.description: Global credential record - one row per real human across every Application. Reachable ONLY through auth-service actions; never wire-projected.

imp_.description: PlatformUser act-as session against a tenant User. 60-min hard cap; append-only compliance evidence.

inv_.description: An invitation issued to a target_type + target_email tuple.

ive_.description: Audit-funnel row: sent → delivered → opened → clicked → accepted/declined.

lhd_.description: Freezes retention on a subject / tenant / case / class scope. Requires two-person approval to apply.

lng_.description: Curated per-platform language row (BCP-47 tag + display metadata + is_beta flag).

mfc_.description: Ephemeral in-flight MFA challenge. Shared ledger owned by identity/auth; schema documented in mfa module.

nlc_.description: Send event combining an Issue + Audience + scheduled_at.

nli_.description: One issue of a Newsletter (editorial content + subject).

not_.description: The universal delivery record — one row per (recipient, category, template, dispatch).
not_.note: `not_` reads naturally as the abbreviation for `notification` in the ULID context; SQL keyword collision is not a concern because ULID values are always quoted strings.

per_.description: Spatie-extended permission row. Dot-notated names with scope suffix.

pln_.description: Per-Application plan definition (maps to Stripe Price or Paddle Product).

plp_.description: 1:1 PII satellite of PlatformUser (name, phone, avatar, Slack + GitHub handles, timezone). HR-controlled fields immutable.

plu_.description: Academorix-staff principal on the `platform_admin` guard. Cross-tenant + cross-application by construction.

prf_.description: 1:1 PII satellite of User (name, phone, avatar, locale, timezone).

psub_.description: Active subscription binding a tenant to a Plan.

rdf_.description: Academorix metadata layer for system roles - business_type default provisioning, i18n labels, min-tier gating.

rol_.description: Spatie-extended role row with (application_id, tenant_id, is_system, description, sort_order).

rtr_.description: Audit trail of a single retention sweep (per tenant, per invocation).

sae_.description: Synonym / alias entry for a search index.

set_.description: Persisted value for a (owner, group_key, name) tuple.

sev_.description: Vector embedding entry for semantic search.

sfi_.description: Minor-safeguarding report inbox entry. Severity-driven escalation SLAs.

sidx_.description: Definition of a searchable index (target model + fields).

sopt_.description: Per-index tuning options (ranking rules, stop words).

spr_.description: Versioned VPC / DPA registry entry - every third party that processes subject data.

sq_.description: Query audit row for search analytics.
sq_.note: 2 chars — below the min-3 rule; grandfathered until refactor. Rename target: `sqa_` (SearchQueryAudit).

ssync_.description: Per-index sync state (last full index, incremental cursor).
ssync_.note: 5 chars — breaks the max-4 rule; grandfathered until refactor. Rename target: `sst_` (SearchSyncState) once the schema is v2.

sua_.description: Per-issuance signed-URL audit row. High-volume; 90-day hard-purge retention. signature_hash unique for redemption lookup.

sub_.description: Legacy alias for `psub_` — grandfathered from v0.1.

supp_.description: Add-on line attached to a subscription.

svc_.description: Machine credential for inter-service authentication. Bound to one Application via application_id; optionally tenant-scoped.

ten_.description: Tenant row. Belongs to an Application.

tmb_.description: Row that pins a User to a Tenant with a Role. Multi-tenant membership pivot.

tpl_.description: Versioned reusable template (one row per locale + version).

trn_.description: UI-string translation row keyed on (tenant_id?, namespace, group, key, locale).

use_.description: Audit row for a consume() call.

usr_.description: Per-Application projection of an Identity. Unique on (identity_id, application_id).

wac_.description: FIDO2 credential (platform authenticator or roaming hardware key). Global aggregate - belongs to Identity.

wit_.description: Third-party integration credentials per Tenant. Config encrypted at rest.

wsub_.description: Customer-registered inbound URL + destination + event list.

xart_.description: Import / export artifact file reference (CSV, XLSX, JSON).

brn_.description: Reserved. Do NOT reuse for Branding — that's `brd_`.

renaming_history.reason: Length reduction; frees `bra_` for future use.
Length reduction + entity-qualifying prefix (TenantContact vs generic `contact_` which is too broad).
Entity-qualifying (TenantIntegration vs generic `intg`); frees `int_` for potential future use.
Length reduction. `not_` in the ULID context is unambiguous — SQL parses ULID values as strings, never as boolean operators.
Wave 1 identity module User schema now landed; prefix promoted from reserved_for_future to active.

checks: Every keyPrefix in x-eloquent maps to an entry here.
Every JSON Schema `pattern` matches the format `^<prefix>[0-9A-HJKMNP-TV-Z]{26}$`.
No two entities share a prefix.
Renamed prefixes have a `renamed_from` field for traceability.
